query: PostgreSQL analytics ecosystem tools Apache Kafka Spark integration real-time pipeline 2024
answer: Apache Kafka and Spark are used for real-time data pipelines, while PostgreSQL serves as the data storage. Integration allows scalable, low-latency data processing. Tools like Airflow can manage workflows.

results.title: Kafka and PostgreSQL: Building Real-Time Data Pipelines in 2024
results.snippet: 🚀   Portable does more than just ELT. Apache Kafka is a highly scalable, distributed event streaming platform designed for high-throughput, low-latency data processing. The PostgreSQL database, often referred to as simply “Postgres,” serves as the backbone of the data storage layer in this architecture. The psql command-line tool is commonly used for interacting with the PostgreSQL database, allowing you to execute SQL commands and manage the database from the terminal. Docker images for Kafka and PostgreSQL are readily available on GitHub, along with configuration files that can be customized to suit your environment. ### Creating and Managing Kafka Topics. This involves setting up alerts for potential issues, such as high latency or connector failures, and implementing failover strategies to minimize downtime. If you encounter persistent issues, you can refer to online tutorials or consult the documentation for Kafka, PostgreSQL, and their associated tools. © 2026 Portable, Inc. All rights reserved.
